name: GIGABYTE B550 VISION D-P ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5400(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - 2x Thunderbolt 3 USB Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Dual 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B550 VISION D-P ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Gigabyte B550 Vision D-P ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with DDR4 support, dual PCIe 4.0 x16, and Thunderbolt 3.
